scenario.name: IMS Call UAS
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] [last_Record-Route:] Contact: <sip:+86[field9]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> P-Charging-Vector: icid-value=IMS-SIPp-[call_id];orig-ioi=[field1];term-ioi=[field1] Supported: precondition, 100rel, timer, sec-agree RSeq: 1 Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, BYE, UPDATE, REFER, NOTIFY, MESSAGE, OPTIONS Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len] Require: 100rel, precondition
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=sendrecv

SIP/2.0 180 Ringing [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:+86[field9]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:+86[field9]@[field1]> P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=46001123456789 Require: timer, sec-agree Supported: precondition, 100rel Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, BYE, UPDATE, REFER, NOTIFY, MESSAGE, OPTIONS Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] P-Charging-Vector: icid-value=IMS-SIPp-[call_id];orig-ioi=[field1];term-ioi=[field1]
Contact: <sip:+86[field9]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:96 0-15 a=curr:qos local sendrecv a=curr:qos remote sendrecv a=des:qos mandatory local sendrecv a=des:qos mandatory remote sendrecv a=sendrecv a=ptime:20

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] P-Charging-Vector: icid-value=IMS-SIPp-[call_id];orig-ioi=[field1];term-ioi=[field1]
User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 HW-Rto/V1.0 Content-Length: 0
